items.title: May 27, 1982: The Lakers go on a 40-9 scoring run during 11 minutes of the 2nd half on their way to a 124-117 win over the 76ers in Game 1 of the NBA Finals.
items.author: NBA Cobwebs
items.body_excerpt:
May 27, 1982: The Lakers go on a 40-9 scoring run during 11 minutes of the 2nd half on their way to a 124-117 win over the 76ers in Game 1 of the NBA Finals.

All seven Lakers who entered the game scored in double figures, led by Norm Nixon and Jamaal Wilkes, who had 24 PTS each.

items.title: Here is what Alex Rodriguez said about a rebrand last July when he and Marc Lore took control of the team:
items.author: Ryan Eichten
items.body_excerpt:
Here is what Alex Rodriguez said about a rebrand last July when he and Marc Lore took control of the team:

"As far as rebranding, we have good thoughts and bringing back some of the history of the KG days is something that we're both very aware that's important to our fan base."

items.title: Knicks have been trending in this direction since Brunson acquisition, but let's not undersell how unlikely this run would have seemed a few years ago. Like trying to imagine the Cowboys or Maple Leafs obliterating teams in a historically-dominant run to the championship round.
items.author: Sports Media Watch
items.body_excerpt: Knicks have been trending in this direction since Brunson acquisition, but let's not undersell how unlikely this run would have seemed a few years ago. Like trying to imagine the Cowboys or Maple Leafs obliterating teams in a historically-dominant run to the championship round.
